stmt: ∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x : α, x * x = x
∃ (α : Type) (_ : SemigroupLike01 α), ∃ x y z : α, (x * y) * z ≠ x * (y * z)
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y : α, (x * y) * x = x * y
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y : α, (x * y) * y = x * y
∃ (α : Type) (_ : SemigroupLike01 α), ¬ ∃ e : α, ∀ x : α, e * x = x
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y : α, x * (x * y) = x * y
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, ((x * y) * z) * y = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ e f : α, (∀ x : α, x * e = e ∧ e * x = e) → (∀ x : α, x * f = f ∧ f * x = f) → e = f
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, ((x * y) * z) * x = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z t : α, (((x * y) * z) * t) = (((x * y) * t) * z)
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (((x * y) * z) * (x * y)) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [Mul α], ∀ e f : α, (∀ x : α, x * e = e) → (∀ x : α, f * x = f) → e = f
∀ {α : Type _} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ e : α, (∀ x : α, x * e = e) → ∀ x : α, e * x = e
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (x * y) * (x * z) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (((x * y) * z) * x) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (((x * y) * z) * z) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (x * y) * ((x * y) * z) = (x * y) * z
